# Awesome GitHub README

A curated collection of 50+ tools for creating stunning GitHub profile READMEs.

## What's Inside

- `README.md` - Main collection with featured profiles, tools, and examples
- `CONTRIBUTING.md` - How to submit your profile or suggest a tool
- `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md` - Community guidelines
- `llms.txt` - AI crawler guidance
- `templates/` - 5 ready-to-use README templates
- `profiles/` - Community-submitted profile showcases

## Quick Links

- [Browse the Collection](../README.md)
- [View Templates](../templates/)
- [Submit Your Profile](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-github-readme/issues/new?template=add-profile.yml)
- [Suggest a Tool](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-github-readme/issues/new?template=add-tool.yml)
- [Generate Cards](https://coolreadme.xyz)

## Stats

- Templates: 5
- Tools Featured: 25+
- Card Types (coolreadme.xyz): 15+
- Categories: 8
